summary: Parallel review: FAIL (2 critical, 12 warning, 14 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: - ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/cron.mjs:20` тАФ `readProjectNumber` duplicated verbatim from `outer-loop.mjs:118`; extract to shared utility

- ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/github.mjs:266` тАФ `setProjectItemStatus` re-reads tracking config via implicit `process.cwd()` even though `cron-tick` already validated it with an explicit path; split authority risk
- ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/cron.mjs:140` тАФ Failure-path revert doesn't check `_setProjectItemStatus` return value (success path does at lines 118, 130)

ЁЯФ┤ tasks/task-4/handshake.json:7 тАФ Handshake claims "All 585 tests pass" but artifact shows 555 tests (553 pass, 2 skip); artifact contains 4 tests not present in the current test file and log output lacking ISO timestamps that the current code produces. Re-run tests and re-capture the artifact.

ЁЯЯб bin/lib/cron.mjs:139 тАФ `_setProjectItemStatus` and `_commentIssue` share a single try block in the recovery path; if the revert throws, the issue comment is silently skipped. These are independent API endpoints (`gh issue comment` vs `gh project item-edit`). Separate into independent try/catch blocks.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/cron.mjs:140` тАФ Failure path doesn't check `setProjectItemStatus` return value (unlike the success path which logs a warning on `false`). If the revert API call silently fails, there's no indication. File to backlog.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/cron.mjs:140` тАФ `setProjectItemStatus` return value not checked on the revert path. Success path (lines 129-132) checks for `false` and logs a warning; failure revert path silently ignores `false`. Item could get stuck in "in-progress" permanently with no log trace.

ЁЯЯб `test/cron-tick.test.mjs` тАФ No test exercises `commentIssue` throwing on the failure path. The recovery-failure test (line 298) makes `setProjectItemStatus` throw, so `commentIssue` is never reached. The path where revert succeeds but comment throws is untested.

ЁЯЯб `test/cron-tick.test.mjs` тАФ Input sanitization at `cron.mjs:111` (control chars, Unicode line separators, 200-char truncation) has no test at HEAD. The gate output shows these tests passing, but they don't exist in the current test file тАФ 4 tests were removed since the gate was captured.
| ЁЯЯб | Title sanitization tests removed тАФ zero regression coverage on a security boundary | `test/cron-tick.test.mjs` |
| ЁЯЯб | `commentIssue` return value unchecked in failure-revert path тАФ silent failure, missing observability | `bin/lib/cron.mjs:142` |
| ЁЯЯб | `listProjectItems` exception propagates unhandled тАФ raw stack trace in cron.log | `bin/lib/cron.mjs:96` |

**No critical (ЁЯФ┤) findings.** The implementation correctly uses array-based `spawnSync` for all `gh` CLI calls (no shell injection), truncates error messages to 500 chars before posting to GitHub (no info leakage via stack traces), and properly isolates recovery ops with inner try/catch. All three warnings are backlog items that don't block merge.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/cron.mjs:20-31` тАФ `readProjectNumber(cwd)` is a near-identical copy of `outer-loop.mjs:118-128`. Same regex, same error handling, same return type. Extract to a shared location and import in both modules.
